cards.title: Real-World Concern
cards.governance_note: Keep the motivating concern separate from the formal computational task.

cards.title: Formal Problem
cards.governance_note: Define inputs, outputs, constraints, states, objectives, and assumptions.

cards.title: Stopping Condition
cards.governance_note: Make termination rules explicit, especially for failure and no-solution cases.

cards.title: Formalization Risk
cards.governance_note: Audit the gap between the original concern and the formalized task.
